patient_summary: 73-year-old female with documented hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. History notable for MRSA of the right breast (Original Date: 09/03/2020; Most Recent: 09/04/2020; Resolved: 03/29/2023) and prior COVID-19 infection (01/04/2021; resolved 01/24/2021). Recent labs include GLUCOSE 199 (H) on 01/11/2021, BUN 37 (H), CREATININE 1.1 (H), and GFR 50 (A) (01/11/2021). Lipid panel (07/17/2020) CHOLTOTAL 136, TG 101, HDLCHOL 38 (L), LDLCHOL 78. Current medication action documented: Atorvastatin refill request; patient-reported insulin use twice daily and desire to discontinue insulin. Care team includes PCP Curtis L. Hershey, MD and multiple specialists (endocrinology, cardiology, surgery, oncology). Functional limitations noted (01/05/2021): difficulty walking, dressing/bathing, and doing errands alone. Follow-up and procedures scheduled through 2025, including ancillary procedure 08/18/2025.
